title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude (Fable 5 version) built a solar system simulation from physics first principles and used it to predict solar eclipses. The demonstration shows the model's ability to derive orbital mechanics and apply them to astronomical prediction.
writeup: The video shows Claude (Fable 5) building a solar system simulation from physics first principles and using it to predict solar eclipses. It demonstrates the model deriving orbital mechanics and applying them to an astronomical prediction task. The takeaways center on spatial reasoning, simulation, and physics modeling: the model does not just recall facts about orbits, it constructs the underlying dynamics and uses them to forecast a specific event.
